issues.description: Use of http.DefaultClient without timeout configuration can lead to hanging requests and potential denial of service vulnerabilities.
issues.suggested_fix: Replace http.DefaultClient with a custom client that has appropriate timeouts set via http.Client.Timeout.

issues.description: Deferred response body closing in the non-buffered stream case could lead to resource leaks if the context is canceled before the body is fully read.
issues.suggested_fix: Ensure response body is always properly closed by using a separate defer statement or implementing proper cleanup in all code paths.

issues.description: Error handling in the defer block doesn't distinguish between different types of errors, potentially masking important context.
issues.suggested_fix: Add error type checking or wrapping in the defer block to provide more specific error handling and logging.

issues.description: Use of ioutil.NopCloser is deprecated in Go 1.16+. Should use io.NopCloser instead for better compatibility.
issues.suggested_fix: Replace ioutil.NopCloser with io.NopCloser in EncodeJSONRequest and EncodeXMLRequest functions.

issues.description: Missing retry logic for transient HTTP errors (5xx, network issues) which could improve resilience in production environments.
issues.suggested_fix: Add configurable retry middleware with exponential backoff for transient errors.

issues.description: External dependency on github.com/sony/gobreaker creates tight coupling and potential supply chain vulnerability.
issues.suggested_fix: Consider implementing a lightweight circuit breaker interface that can be backed by different implementations.

issues.description: Circular import pattern with github.com/go-kit/log package creates confusing dependency structure.
issues.suggested_fix: Restructure packages to avoid circular imports or use interfaces to break the dependency cycle.

issues.description: Metrics interfaces don't include context parameters, limiting their usefulness in distributed tracing scenarios.
issues.suggested_fix: Add context.Context parameter to metrics methods to enable better integration with distributed tracing.

issues.description: Middleware chaining uses reverse iteration which can be confusing for developers new to the codebase.
issues.suggested_fix: Add clear documentation explaining the middleware execution order and consider providing a builder pattern for more intuitive composition.

issues.description: Context values for response headers and size are set without validation, potentially allowing header injection attacks.
issues.suggested_fix: Validate context keys and values before setting them to prevent header injection vulnerabilities.
